headline: Google Calendar finally has more color options for events
summary: Google Calendar now offers expanded color choices for events. Users can access up to 200 custom colors for individual events. The update applies to web, mobile apps, and the Calendar API.

headline: The midterms are going to be a data security nightmare
summary: Upcoming midterm elections face major data security threats. A messy database could disenfranchise voters and risk breaches. Experts warn against the DHS's Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) program.

headline: The Verge’s guide to Amazon Prime Day 2026
summary: Amazon Prime Day 2026 begins on June 23rd with summer deals. The Verge will cover the best discounts, including pre-Prime Day offers. Expect significant price drops across various product categories.

headline: The best robot vacuum deals available ahead of Prime Day
summary: Early robot vacuum deals are available before Prime Day. Retailers offer discounts on popular models from brands like Roborock. It's a good time to buy a robot vacuum if cost was a barrier.

headline: Crimson Moon Marries Diablo and Dark Souls for a Bloody, Breezy Good Time
summary: Crimson Moon is a new game blending elements of Diablo and Dark Souls. It offers a "bloody, breezy good time" with roguelike and loot features. Developer Probably Monsters aims for engaging combat and interesting mechanics.

headline: No Law's Dense Cybergrunge City Might Just Be the Most Alive Open World Ever Created
summary: An interview with Neon Giant, developer of the game "No Law". The game features a dense "cybergrunge" city. Its open world is described as potentially the most alive ever created.

headline: GTA 6 Cover Art and Pre-Order Reveal Comes With a Fresh Look at Vice City
summary: Rockstar revealed the GTA 6 cover art and pre-order date. A new image of Vice City was added to the official website. Pre-orders for GTA 6 will begin on June 25.

headline: GTA 6 Cover Artwork Revealed, Pre-Orders Begin June 25
summary: Rockstar officially unveiled the cover artwork for GTA 6. The announcement includes the start date for pre-orders. Pre-orders for the highly anticipated game open on June 25.

headline: Teacher who murdered adopted baby son Preston Davey given whole life prison sentence
summary: Jamie Varley, a teacher, received a whole life sentence. He was convicted of murdering his adopted baby son, Preston Davey. Preston died after months of sexual and physical abuse.

headline: Weapons, money and ships: How is this Iran deal different from others?
summary: BBC Verify examines a new deal between the US and Iran. The analysis focuses on implications for weapons, money, and ships. The report aims to highlight differences from previous agreements.

headline: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
summary: Moscow experienced its largest Ukrainian drone attack of the war. Almost 200 drones struck areas south-east of the capital. A refinery and shopping center were reported to be burning.

headline: 'Do not travel' advice for Dubai dropped
summary: 'Do not travel' advice for Dubai has been lifted. Thousands of British tourists were stranded in the Middle East. The travel warning was issued after the US-Iran war began in early 2026.
